zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Tailboys於1433年出生在英國林可爾史爾吉時，她的父親Sir Walter Tailboys , VI baronet kyme42歲，母親Lady Alice Stafford42歲。她於大約1455年與Thomas Strangways在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1502年在英國英格蘭多瑟特梅爾波利 桑普福德享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Tailboys于1433年出生在英国林可爾史爾吉时，她的父亲Sir Walter Tailboys , VI baronet kyme42岁，母亲Lady Alice Stafford42岁。她于大约1455年与Thomas Strangways在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1502年在英国英格兰多瑟特梅爾波利 桑普福德享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tailboys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Talboys
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Taillebois (Orne).

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Tailboys was born in 1433, in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir Walter Tailboys , VI baronet kyme, was 42 and her mother, Lady Alice Stafford, was 42. She married Thomas Strangways about 1455, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1502, in Melbury Sampford, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Tailboys est née en 1433, à Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Walter Tailboys , VI baronet kyme, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Stafford, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Strangways environ 1455, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1502, à Melbury Sampford, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

Sie hat um 1455 in England, United Kingdom Thomas Strangways geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Lei sposato Thomas Strangways circa 1455, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Tailboysが1433年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアクイメで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Tailboys , VI baronet kymeは42歳，母Lady Alice Staffordは42歳であった。約1455年にイギリスイギリスでThomas Strangwaysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1502年にイギリスイギリスドールセトメルブリー サンプフォードで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Tailboys(이)가 1433년 영국 링코실르 키에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Walter Tailboys , VI baronet kyme(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Stafford(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 대략 1455년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Thomas Strangways(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1502년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 멜버이 샘p퍼드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Thomas Strangways aproximadamente 1455, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Tailboys родилась в 1433 г. в местности ким, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Walter Tailboys , VI baronet kyme было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Stafford, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Strangways около 1455 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1502 г. в местности мелбури сэмпфорд, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.
